dict.string: Athas uses the microphone for optional voice input in Agent.
Athas uses speech recognition to transcribe optional voice input in Agent.
Athas needs access to project files in Documents so terminals, Git, and editor tools can run inside your workspace.
Athas needs access to project files on Desktop so terminals, Git, and editor tools can run inside your workspace.
Athas needs access to project files in Downloads so terminals, Git, and editor tools can run inside your workspace.
